title: National workload action group: reports on social worker workload
body: "The Department for Education (DfE) set up the national workload action group in response to the independent review of children’s social care.  The group:   aimed to find ways to reduce social workers’ workload developed recommendations for DfE    DfE commissioned Research in Practice, who wrote these reports, to support this work.  The final report:   summarises the group’s work and the conclusions of the research makes recommendations for government to consider   The other reports have more detail on the 5 priority areas the group focused on in the final report.  The government has responded to the group’s findings.  Research in Practice has also developed tools and resources for local authorities to use.  "
